mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, type, title, content, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isRead}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT br.id AS borrowId, bm.title AS bookTitle, br.borrow_date AS borrowDate, br.due_date AS dueDate, br.return_date AS returnDate FROM borrow_records br JOIN book_items bi ON br.rfid_tag = bi.rfid_tag JOIN book_metadata bm ON bi.isbn = bm.isbn WHERE br.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC
